tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Daughtry
Song: Life After You

CAPO 2

INTRO: [ch]Em[/ch]	[ch]C[/ch]	[ch]G[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
       [ch]Em[/ch]	[ch]C[/ch]	[ch]G[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Em[/ch]

Verse
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch] 			    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm ten miles from town, and I just broke down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]				[ch]Em[/ch]
Spitting out smoke on the side of the road[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]				 [ch]G[/ch]
I'm out here alone, just trying to get home[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]			   [ch]A[/ch] 
To tell you I was wrong, but you already know[/tab]

Pre-Chorus

[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]		     [ch]A[/ch]
Believe me I won't stop for nothin'[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
To see you so I've started runnin'[/tab]

Chorus

[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is the love and the laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
After the life we've been through[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause I know there's no life after you[/tab]

[ch]Em[/ch]	[ch]C[/ch]	[ch]G[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Em[/ch]

Verse

[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch] 			    [ch]G[/ch]
The last time we talked, the night that I walked[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]			      [ch]Em[/ch]
Burns like an iron in the back of my mind[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]		     [ch]G[/ch]                 
I must've been high, to say you and I[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch] 
weren't meant to be an' just wasting my time[/tab]

Pre-Chorus

[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]		  [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, why did I ever doubt you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
You know, I will die here without you[/tab]


Chorus

[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is the love and the laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
After the life we've been through[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause I know there's no life after you[/tab]

Bridge

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]    
You and I, right or wrong, there's no other one[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
After this time spent I alone[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Em[/ch]                                         
It's hard to believe that a man with sight could be so blind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Thinkin' 'bout the better times, must've been outta my mind[/tab]
D (STRUM ONCE DOWN LET RING)
So I'm running back to tell you


Pre Chorus

[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Without you God knows what I'd do, yeah[/tab]

Repeat Chorus

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
You know there's no life after you (X3)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
No, there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Yeah[/tab]
